verdict: Highly repetitive chart featuring copy-pasted patterns, lazy structuring, and uncomfortable spin-based stream segments.

issues.problem: Extreme repetition of the exact four-note pattern (L-R-U-D) in an 8th-note stream for 12 continuous seconds, forcing uncomfortable physical spins or constant double-stepping.
Awkward flow break where a D hold is placed during an active 8th-note stream, forcing the player to hold D, tap L, and immediately transition the holding foot to tap R on an 8th note.
Highly monotonous 4th-note section consisting of repeating U-D-R/U-D-L and D-U-L/D-U-R loops, making the chart feel uninspired and lazy.
